mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trip_plan(user_id, title, city, days, budget_cents, party_adults, party_kids, pace, departure_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{city}, #{days}, #{budgetCents}, #{partyAdults}, #{partyKids}, #{pace}, #{departureDate})
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM style_tag WHERE code = #{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO trip_plan_style(plan_id, style_id) VALUES (#{planId}, #{styleId})
INSERT INTO trip_day(plan_id, day_index, hotel_place_id, note, hotel_reason, hotel_tip) VALUES (#{planId}, #{dayIndex}, #{hotelPlaceId}, #{note}, #{hotelReason}, #{hotelTip})
mapper.update: UPDATE trip_day SET hotel_place_id = #{hotelPlaceId} WHERE id = #{dayId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trip_day_stop(day_id, seq, place_id, dwell_minutes, note, category, time_slot, start_time, end_time, reason, tip) VALUES (#{dayId}, #{seq}, #{placeId}, #{dwellMinutes}, #{note}, #{category}, #{timeSlot}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{reason}, #{tip})
mapper.select: SELECT id,title,city,days,favorite,created_at,budget_cents,party_adults,party_kids,pace,departure_date FROM trip_plan WHERE id = #{planId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, day_index AS dayIndex, hotel_place_id AS hotelPlaceId, note, hotel_reason AS hotelReason, hotel_tip AS hotelTip FROM trip_day WHERE plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY day_index ASC

select id, name, address as addressLine, city, district, country, latitude, longitude, external_ref, website_uri AS websiteUri, google_maps_uri AS googleMapsUri, business_status AS businessStatus from place where id in
#{id}
